backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with a single `version` function that returns the string '1.0'.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all seven friend tribute message paragraphs in `friendsData.ts` were rewritten in a warm, collective third-person voice.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing the purpose and recent changes of every frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'The Archive of Us' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all five page sections with shared GoldParticles and MughalArchBackground layers, plus a gold-themed footer.
frontend/src/components/FriendPortrait.t: Component that displays a friend's uploaded photo or falls back to a gold-gradient avatar showing their initials.
frontend/src/components/GoldParticles.ts: Canvas-based component that animates 55 floating gold dust particles across the full viewport as a fixed background layer.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section featuring a staggered letter-by-letter title reveal, sequential fade-ins for subtitle and poetry, and an animated gold border frame.
frontend/src/components/LastPanelSection: Final page section with a gold-framed farewell message that fades out its border after a delay, ending with a 'Forever Archived.' reveal.
frontend/src/components/MughalArchBackgr: Renders a fixed, full-screen decorative SVG background featuring a Mughal-style pointed arch with gold ornamental details at very low opacity.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: A photo upload component for a friend that provides file input, upload/remove buttons with gold styling, and error display, delegating logic to the usePhotoUpload hook.
frontend/src/components/SacredSixSection: Displays a grid of friend portrait cards ('The Sacred Seven' section) with scroll-fade animations, and opens a TributePanel overlay when a card is clicked.
frontend/src/components/TestimonySection: Renders a 'Testimony' section with scroll-animated manuscript text and three decorative polaroid frames with drifting animations.
frontend/src/components/TributeAnimation: Provides multiple ambient background animation components (heartbeat pulses, canvas constellation, crown SVG, ripple) selected by an AnimationType prop for use in tribute cards.
frontend/src/components/TributeLettersSe: Renders a vertically stacked list of animated letter cards, one per friend, each featuring their emoji, name, title, epithet, tribute text, and a background TributeAnimation, with scroll-triggered fade-in transitions.
frontend/src/components/TributePanel.tsx: A full-screen modal portal component that displays a tribute for a given friend, including their portrait, animated background, messages, and a photo upload control, with Escape key and backdrop-click dismissal.
frontend/src/data/friendsData.ts: Defines the Friend interface and exports a static array of seven friend objects, each with an id, name, title, epithet, animation type, emoji, and tribute message lines.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and expose the current identity to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/usePhotoUpload.ts: Custom hook that handles reading, storing, and removing a friend's photo as a base64 data URI in localStorage, with upload state and error tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module that exports nothing, noting that no backend queries are needed because the site uses only static assets and hardcoded data.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollFadeIn.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set an isVisible flag when the referenced element scrolls into view, enabling scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for the gold-and-dark theme, and declares animations for film grain, gold glow, scroll fade-in, letter reveal, border draw, and shimmer effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the project, defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond, Dancing Script), a gold/archive dark color palette using oklch variables, custom shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'The Archive of Us', tracking schema version, existing features, and a pending request (AR-1) to rewrite all seven friend card paragraphs in friendsData.ts to a warm, playful third-person group-shoutout tone.
